problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
